name: Photon
description: Photon Spectrum channel plugin for OpenClaw

provider.description: Spectrum provider to use. Production uses remote iMessage.

projectSecret.description: Photon project secret. Prefer projectSecretEnv instead of committing inline secrets.

projectIdEnv.description: Environment variable that holds the Photon project id.

projectSecretEnv.description: Environment variable that holds the Photon project secret.

local.description: Use local iMessage mode. Production default is remote Photon/Spectrum.

flattenGroups.description: Flatten group metadata into OpenClaw inbound message context.

dmPolicy.description: Direct-message trust policy. Pairing challenges new senders by default.

allowFrom.description: Allowed DM sender ids for allowlist/pairing-approved direct messages.

groupPolicy.description: Group trust policy. Allowlist blocks groups unless their Spectrum space id is in groupAllowFrom.

groupAllowFrom.description: Allowed cached Spectrum group space ids. Empty with groupPolicy=allowlist blocks all groups.

requireMention.description: Require a configured mention/wake word before accepted group messages reach the agent.

mentionNames.description: Mention or wake names recognised in group chats.

textChunkLimit.description: Maximum text characters sent in a single Photon outbound chunk.

maxInboundAttachmentBytes.description: Maximum inbound attachment bytes cached into OpenClaw media storage. Default is 20 MiB.

maxOutboundAttachmentBytes.description: Maximum local outbound file or buffer bytes accepted before Spectrum handoff. Default is 50 MiB.

sendReadReceipts.description: Mark accepted inbound iMessages read best-effort in remote iMessage mode.

dispatchControlEvents.description: Dispatch tapbacks, unsends, typing, poll votes, and similar controls into agent turns.

nativeActions.description: Expose Spectrum/iMessage-native actions, including effects, through OpenClaw message actions.

dangerousNativeActions.description: Allow disruptive group/background/mini-app actions for non-owners. False keeps them owner-gated.

miniAppDefaults.description: Reusable iMessage extension metadata for direct-chat mini-app cards. Use real app/team/bundle/url values only.

appName.description: Visible app name for the iMessage mini-app card.

appStoreId.description: Optional App Store id for the iMessage app.

extensionBundleId.description: iMessage extension bundle id, for example com.example.MessagesExtension.

teamId.description: Apple developer team id for the iMessage extension.

url.description: URL opened by the iMessage mini-app payload.

accounts.description: Optional per-account Photon channel configs keyed by account id.
